privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus data. The required worklog entry must target the request titled 'VPN disconnects intermittently for remote user' (explicitly injected via setup_task.sh). The agent is required to log exactly 150 minutes (2 hours 30 minutes) and the description must contain the keywords 'MTU', 'VPN', 'fragmentation', and '4.3'. The entry must be assigned to the 'administrator' technician.
